selected_idea.title: Sample Efficiency Optimization
selected_idea.pitch: EV001 and EV002 describe automated pipelines but don't optimize for sample efficiency, potentially requiring more data than necessary for effective research.
selected_idea.mechanism: If sample efficiency is optimized, the sample efficiency ratio will improve by at least 30% compared to current implementations.
selected_idea.testable_hypothesis: If sample efficiency is optimized, the sample efficiency ratio will improve by at least 30% compared to current implementations.
